title: Vanilla Shutters
description: A vanilla approach to shutters, a.k.a. vertical trapdoors or one-high doors, to decorate your windows with! Supports Biomes 'O Plenty, BetterEnd & BetterNether
body:
**Ever wanted more control over the light coming through your windows? Or were you just missing that decorational touch? Maybe you wanted to add a toggle switch to your mob farm? All these problems are solved with...**
# 🚪 Vanilla Shutters

![4 Windows with Shutters, from left to right: Copper Shutters, in various stages of oxidization, Iron Shutters, the left side is opened with a Lever on the top, Jungle Shutters, both open, Acacia Shutter, right open](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08cb200d07722b55403380b28812cbd5fa12ee58.png)
## ✅ Features
- **15+ Variants** to use in all your builds!
- **Waterloggable**, for those that need to block out the sun underwater.
- **Redstone Use**, allowing you to instantly send a signal up or down. 
- **Blocks out the Light**, giving you some privacy and control over lighting.
- **Doesn't connect** to Fences, Panes & Walls.
- **Supports other mods**, such as Biomes 'O Plenty, BetterEnd, BetterNether & Pine!
